summary: A new authenticated route (/face-detector) and a visible “Face Detector” navigation button were added. However, the actual Face Detector functionality (webcam/photo modes with overlays, model loading UX, and error handling) is not implemented; the page mainly shows installation instructions and a “Feature Not Available” message. Model-related utilities/hooks and static model asset placeholders were added, but dependency integration is not completed in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Implement the Face Detector page with two usable modes (“Webcam” and “Photo Upload”), including start/stop camera, image upload/clear, and overlaying detected face bounding boxes locally in-browser, with camera-permission/no-camera error handling while keeping photo upload usable.
missing_requirements.reason: The added FaceDetectorPage content shown is an informational/installation-required page and does not show any UI for webcam start/stop, tabs/modes (“Webcam” / “Photo Upload”), image upload/clear, or real-time/photo detection overlays and related error handling.
evidence: frontend/src/pages/FaceDetectorPage.tsx (truncated snippet shows 'Feature Not Available' and installation steps, not webcam/upload detection UI)

missing_requirements.requirement: Integrate a browser-based face detection library (e.g., face-api.js) with production-ready static model assets under frontend/public, plus visible model-loading state that disables detection controls until ready, and a clear English error with suggested retry if model loading fails.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff does not show adding the actual dependency (e.g., package.json update) and the FaceDetectorPage explicitly states the package is not installed. While model files/paths and a loading hook are added, the page shown does not implement the required loading/disable-controls UX or failure+retry UX for an operational detector page.
evidence: frontend/src/pages/FaceDetectorPage.tsx (states face-api.js must be installed; 'Feature Not Available')
frontend/src/hooks/useFaceApiModels.ts (added, but no evidence the page uses it to drive a working loading/ready/error UI)

hallucinated_features.description: Added an installation/instructions-only Face Detector page that blocks functionality and tells the user to manually edit package.json and download models (including documentation links and multi-step setup guidance).
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest requires implementing the feature in-app, not shipping a blocked 'Feature Not Available' page with manual installation instructions as the primary UI.
